rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Windows Installer (msiexec.exe) Downloading and Executing Packages

rules.rule_text:
title: Windows Installer (msiexec.exe) Downloading and Executing Packages
id: 2b09f558-14dc-40ac-b962-66386b5785c1
status: experimental
description: "To detect suspicious use of msiexec.exe by Raspberry Robin or other\
  \ threats, \nit\u2019s essential to take a look at the command line and the URL.\
  \ Detecting \nmsiexec.exe making outbound network connections to download and install\
  \ packages \nin the command-line interface will give you the opportunity to examine\
  \ the \nactivity and determine if it\u2019s malicious or not. Part of the RedCanary\
  \ 2024 \nThreat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/raspberry-robin/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1218
- attack.t1218.007
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection1:
    Image|endswith: \msiexec
  selection2:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - 'http:'
    - 'https:'
  selection3:
    CommandLine|contains|windash: /q
  condition: all of selection*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
